rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be in valid component type scopes; implementation-level bindings go in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts should use valid AADL component structure and data types as referenced in the model.
Boolean expressions in AGREE should match the actual data type of the port or variable in scope.
Do not include AADL property names or unit tokens as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` declarations for range comparisons with proper type alignment (bool, int, real).
Ensure all visible identifiers in AGREE expressions are declared or available in the component scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid generating AGREE clauses that reference AADL timing properties or unit tokens as variables.
Do not assume Boolean ports can be treated as integers or use opaque data in range comparisons.
